The '''Gu-vandi Collective''' was a country on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Praven Prime]]. It was incited into a world war with its neighbor, the [[L'Xing]], when an [[HK-50 series assassin droid]] suggested the mate of the leader of an L'Xing delegation had been impregnated by their Gu-vandi host.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1stm}}
